accounts.name: boss_damage_shard
docs: The shard_index is derived from the instruction data, not from the account seed.
We verify it matches: shard_index == hash(player_pubkey) % boss_shard_count.

errors.name: DayIdTooLong
errors.msg: day_id exceeds the maximum supported length.

errors.name: InvalidMapDimensions
errors.msg: width and height must both be greater than zero.

errors.name: InvalidTimeRange
errors.msg: start_ts must be less than end_ts.

errors.name: InvalidBossHp
errors.msg: boss_hp must be greater than zero.

errors.name: InvalidBossShardCount
errors.msg: boss_shard_count must be greater than zero.

errors.name: DungeonDayMismatch
errors.msg: daily dungeon account does not match the requested day_id.

errors.name: DungeonNotOpen
errors.msg: daily dungeon is not open.

errors.name: DungeonNotInOpenWindow
errors.msg: current time is outside the daily dungeon open window.

errors.name: PoiIdTooLong
errors.msg: poi_id exceeds the maximum supported length.

errors.name: PoiIdHashMismatch
errors.msg: poi_id_hash does not match poi_id.

errors.name: LocationDetailTooLong
errors.msg: location detail field exceeds the maximum supported length.

errors.name: InvalidLocationMerkleProof
errors.msg: location Merkle proof is invalid.

errors.name: MerkleProofTooLong
errors.msg: location Merkle proof is too long.

errors.name: MissingLocationDetail
errors.msg: required location detail account or spec is missing.

errors.name: UnexpectedLocationDetail
errors.msg: unexpected location detail account was provided.

errors.name: InvalidPlayerRun
errors.msg: player run account is invalid.

errors.name: InvalidLocationAccount
errors.msg: location account is invalid.

errors.name: InvalidEnemyLocation
errors.msg: enemy location account is invalid.

errors.name: LocationIsNotShop
errors.msg: location is not a shop.

errors.name: InvalidShopAccount
errors.msg: shop account is invalid.

errors.name: InvalidShopItemSlot
errors.msg: shop item slot configuration is invalid.

errors.name: PlayerRunNotActive
errors.msg: player run is not active.

errors.name: LocationIsNotEnemy
errors.msg: location is not an enemy.

errors.name: EnemyOnCooldown
errors.msg: enemy is still on cooldown.

errors.name: InsufficientEnergy
errors.msg: player does not have enough energy.

errors.name: DailyClearLimitExceeded
errors.msg: player has exceeded the daily enemy clear limit.

errors.name: ArithmeticOverflow
errors.msg: arithmetic overflow.

errors.name: InsufficientStock
errors.msg: shop item slot has insufficient stock.

errors.name: PriceMismatch
errors.msg: expected price does not match the computed price.

errors.name: PurchaseLimitExceeded
errors.msg: player has exceeded the per-wallet daily purchase limit for this item.

errors.name: InvalidDamageScore
errors.msg: damage_score must be greater than zero.

errors.name: DamageScoreExceeded
errors.msg: damage_score exceeds the maximum allowed per submission.

errors.name: ShardIndexMismatch
errors.msg: shard_index does not match the player's assigned shard.

errors.name: BossSubmissionLimitExceeded
errors.msg: player has exceeded the boss submission limit for this daily dungeon.

errors.name: LocationIsNotBoss
errors.msg: location is not a boss location.

errors.name: InvalidBossDamageShard
errors.msg: boss damage shard account is invalid.

errors.name: InvalidBossContribution
errors.msg: player boss contribution account is invalid.

errors.name: InvalidBossLocation
errors.msg: boss location account is invalid.

errors.name: InsufficientBossDamage
errors.msg: player has not dealt enough damage to claim the boss NFT.

errors.name: BossNftAlreadyClaimed
errors.msg: player has already claimed the boss NFT for this daily dungeon.

errors.name: DungeonNotEnded
errors.msg: daily dungeon has not ended yet.

errors.name: DailyRewardAlreadyClaimed
errors.msg: player has already claimed the daily reward for this dungeon.

errors.name: DailyRewardTierNotMet
errors.msg: player run does not satisfy any reward tier condition.

errors.name: PlayerRunNotFound
errors.msg: player run not found for this day and player.

types.name: BossNftClaim
docs: Tracks whether a player has claimed their Boss participation NFT for a given day.
